title: Stardust whitepaper
tagline: Three landing-page treatments for the stardust strategy memo itself. Same content, three takes on "clean, playful, bold" — each pinned to stardust's own identity (ink/dust/amber, SF Pro + SF Mono).

movements: distinctiveness: familiar SaaS landing → distinctive (singular palette + mono-tagged structure)
ground: ink-deep dominant, dust paper as breathing room

originalCritique: There is no live page to critique — this sample is the inverse case. Stardust has a strategy memo to land in front of internal stakeholders, and the question is what "clean, playful, bold" looks like when the brand's own identity (ink/amber/dust, SF Pro + SF Mono, mono-tagged structure) is the canvas. Three variants stratify on one axis each — quiet authority, lively craft, dramatic claim — so the reader can pick which register the memo should occupy.

variants.name: Clean
variants.thesis: Quiet authority. Editorial memo: generous whitespace, modular type, single amber accent per scene, dust particles only in the hero. Restrained motion. The eye finds structure without the page raising its voice.
variants.fix: Quiet authority. The brief reads as an editorial memo — generous vertical rhythm (110–140px section padding), modular 1.25 type ladder, single amber moment per section. Ground rotates ink-deep → dust paper → ink-deep. Motion is scroll-driven fade-in only; no hover choreography. The structure does the persuading; the page does not raise its voice.

variants.name: Playful
variants.thesis: Lively craft. The brief breaks its grid intentionally — varying section widths, color rotation between scenes, expressive type pairings (display + italic + mono in close proximity), micro-interactions. Cursor-following dust, eyebrow numbers tick, architecture diagram lights up on hover.
variants.fix: Lively craft. Section ground rotates: every section a different surface color (ink → ink-soft → dust → ink). Display type alternates roman / italic mid-headline. Mono code chips at section corners. The architecture diagram becomes interactive — hover lights up each node. Cursor-following dust particle near the hero; logo strip enters with staggered y-shift. The page feels authored.

variants.name: Bold
variants.thesis: Dramatic claim. Oversized 124pt hero, full-bleed gradient ground, before/after at 100vw, scroll-driven section transitions, architecture diagram becomes a hero scene of its own. Three oversized stacked claims for "why this matters".
variants.fix: Dramatic claim. 124pt display hero with dust-particle overlay and ground gradient. Before/after at 100vw — frames touch the page edge. Section headlines slide in from the gutter on scroll; sections snap. The architecture diagram is its own full-width hero scene with Slicc as a luminous band over Stardust → Snowflake → AEM. "Why this matters for AEM" renders as three oversized stacked claims, each a scene.
